translations.en: O! Hisham indeed al'aql not lies and if was in it hwah O! Hisham not dyn for whoever not mrwh for him and not mrwh for whoever not intellect for him and indeed greatest the people qdra who/which not he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed indeed your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha O! Hisham indeed Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says indeed from 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l and speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam and points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it from this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish indeed Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said not sits in sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish and said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha from its people it was said O! son of rswl of Allah and who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah in His Book and dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl and said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh to rectitude and etiquettes the scholars zyadh in the intellect and ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might and cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity and guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing and kf aladha from kmal the intellect and in it rahh albdn 'ajla and immediately
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک al'aql نہیں lies اور if was in it hwah اے Hisham نہیں dyn for whoever نہیں mrwh for him اور نہیں mrwh for whoever نہیں intellect for him اور بے شک greatest the people qdra who/which نہیں he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed بے شک your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha اے Hisham بے شک Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says بے شک سے 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l اور speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam اور points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it سے this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish بے شک Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said نہیں sits میں sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish اور said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha سے its people it was said اے son of rswl of Allah اور who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah میں His Book اور dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl اور said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh طرف rectitude اور etiquettes the scholars zyadh میں the intellect اور ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might اور cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity اور guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing اور kf aladha سے kmal the intellect اور in it rahh albdn 'ajla اور immediately
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak al'aql değil lies ve if was in it hwah ey Hisham değil dyn for whoever değil mrwh for him ve değil mrwh for whoever değil intellect for him ve muhakkak greatest the people qdra who/which değil he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed muhakkak your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha ey Hisham muhakkak Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says muhakkak -den 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l ve speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam ve points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it -den this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish muhakkak Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said değil sits içinde sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish ve said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha -den its people it was said ey son of rswl of Allah ve who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah içinde His Book ve dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl ve said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh -e rectitude ve etiquettes the scholars zyadh içinde the intellect ve ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might ve cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity ve guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing ve kf aladha -den kmal the intellect ve in it rahh albdn 'ajla ve immediately
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی al'aql نه lies و if was in it hwah ای Hisham نه dyn for whoever نه mrwh for him و نه mrwh for whoever نه intellect for him و به درستی greatest the people qdra who/which نه he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed به درستی your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha ای Hisham به درستی Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says به درستی از 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l و speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam و points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it از this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish به درستی Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said نه sits در sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish و said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha از its people it was said ای son of rswl of Allah و who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah در His Book و dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl و said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh به سوی rectitude و etiquettes the scholars zyadh در the intellect و ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might و cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity و guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing و kf aladha از kmal the intellect و in it rahh albdn 'ajla و immediately
translations.id: wahai Hisham sesungguhnya al'aql tidak lies dan if was in it hwah wahai Hisham tidak dyn for whoever tidak mrwh for him dan tidak mrwh for whoever tidak intellect for him dan sesungguhnya greatest the people qdra who/which tidak he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed sesungguhnya your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha wahai Hisham sesungguhnya Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says sesungguhnya dari 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l dan speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam dan points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it dari this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish sesungguhnya Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said tidak sits di dalam sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish dan said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha dari its people it was said wahai son of rswl of Allah dan who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah di dalam His Book dan dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl dan said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh kepada rectitude dan etiquettes the scholars zyadh di dalam the intellect dan ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might dan cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity dan guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing dan kf aladha dari kmal the intellect dan in it rahh albdn 'ajla dan immediately
translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই al'aql না lies এবং if was in it hwah হে Hisham না dyn for whoever না mrwh for him এবং না mrwh for whoever না intellect for him এবং নিশ্চয়ই greatest the people qdra who/which না he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed নিশ্চয়ই your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says নিশ্চয়ই থেকে 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l এবং speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam এবং points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it থেকে this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish নিশ্চয়ই Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said না sits মধ্যে sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish এবং said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha থেকে its people it was said হে son of rswl of Allah এবং who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah মধ্যে His Book এবং dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl এবং said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh দিকে rectitude এবং etiquettes the scholars zyadh মধ্যে the intellect এবং ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might এবং cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity এবং guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing এবং kf aladha থেকে kmal the intellect এবং in it rahh albdn 'ajla এবং immediately
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente al'aql no lies y if was in it hwah oh Hisham no dyn for whoever no mrwh for him y no mrwh for whoever no intellect for him y ciertamente greatest the people qdra who/which no he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed ciertamente your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha oh Hisham ciertamente Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says ciertamente de 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l y speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam y points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it de this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish ciertamente Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said no sits en sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish y said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha de its people it was said oh son of rswl of Allah y who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah en His Book y dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl y said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh hacia rectitude y etiquettes the scholars zyadh en the intellect y ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might y cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity y guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing y kf aladha de kmal the intellect y in it rahh albdn 'ajla y immediately
translations.fr: ô Hisham certes al'aql non lies et if was in it hwah ô Hisham non dyn for whoever non mrwh for him et non mrwh for whoever non intellect for him et certes greatest the people qdra who/which non he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed certes your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha ô Hisham certes Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says certes de 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l et speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam et points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it de this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish certes Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said non sits dans sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish et said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha de its people it was said ô son of rswl of Allah et who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah dans His Book et dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl et said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh vers rectitude et etiquettes the scholars zyadh dans the intellect et ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might et cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity et guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing et kf aladha de kmal the intellect et in it rahh albdn 'ajla et immediately
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich al'aql nicht lies und if was in it hwah o Hisham nicht dyn for whoever nicht mrwh for him und nicht mrwh for whoever nicht intellect for him und wahrlich greatest the people qdra who/which nicht he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed wahrlich your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha o Hisham wahrlich Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says wahrlich von 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l und speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam und points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it von this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish wahrlich Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said nicht sits in sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish und said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha von its people it was said o son of rswl of Allah und who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah in His Book und dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl und said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh zu rectitude und etiquettes the scholars zyadh in the intellect und ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might und cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity und guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing und kf aladha von kmal the intellect und in it rahh albdn 'ajla und immediately
translations.ru: о Hisham поистине al'aql не lies и if was in it hwah о Hisham не dyn for whoever не mrwh for him и не mrwh for whoever не intellect for him и поистине greatest the people qdra who/which не he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed поистине your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha о Hisham поистине Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says поистине из 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l и speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam и points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it из this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish поистине Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said не sits в sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish и said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha из its people it was said о son of rswl of Allah и who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah в His Book и dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl и said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh к rectitude и etiquettes the scholars zyadh в the intellect и ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might и cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity и guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing и kf aladha из kmal the intellect и in it rahh albdn 'ajla и immediately
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 al'aql 不 lies 和 if was in it hwah 啊 Hisham 不 dyn for whoever 不 mrwh for him 和 不 mrwh for whoever 不 intellect for him 和 确实 greatest the people qdra who/which 不 he sees the worldly life for himself khtra indeed 确实 your bodies is not lha thmn except aljnh so not tby'wha bghyrha 啊 Hisham 确实 Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) was he says 确实 从 'lamh the wise one that/to to be in it thlath khsal responds when s'l 和 speaks when 'jz alqwm from/about alklam 和 points/indicates balray who/which is/will be in it slah its people so whoever did not be in it 从 this (f) alkhsal the three shy‏' so he is most foolish 确实 Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) said 不 sits 在 sdr almjls except a man in it this (f) alkhsal the three or one (f) mnhn so whoever did not be in it shy‏' mnhn fjls so he is most foolish 和 said al-Hasan son of Ali ( upon him be peace ) when tlbtm alhwa'j fatlbwha 从 its people it was said 啊 son of rswl of Allah 和 who/whoever its people said those who qs Allah 在 His Book 和 dhkrhm so he said verily only he reflects possessors of the minds said they possessors of al'qwl 和 said Ali son of al-Husayn ( upon him be peace ) mjalsh the righteous da'yh 向 rectitude 和 etiquettes the scholars zyadh 在 the intellect 和 ta'h rulers of al'dl tmam might 和 cultivation wealth tmam magnanimity 和 guidance almstshyr qda' lhq blessing 和 kf aladha 从 kmal the intellect 和 in it rahh albdn 'ajla 和 immediately
